items.title: Semenyo's stunner seals FA Cup for Man City; Chels...
items.summary: Antoine Semenyo's sublime back-heel finish was worthy of winning any cup final, while Chelsea could now miss out on Europe altogether.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Preakness Stake 2026 odds, post positions: Incredibolt, Iron Honor, Taj Mahal picks from horse racing expert
items.summary: Jody Demling, who has called 11 Preakness winners, reveals his picks for 2026 Preakness Stakes horses such as Iron Honor, Taj Mahal and Incredibolt
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Svitolina handles Gauff for 3rd Italian Open title
items.summary: Elina Svitolina claimed her third Italian Open title Saturday, defeating American Coco Gauff, who lost in the final in Rome for the second straight year, in three sets.
